title: Intelligent Generative AI Chatbot & Knowledge Base
introduction: An enterprise-grade, conversational agent engineered with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to deliver context-aware, secure, and accurate responses.
description: This technical artifact outlines a production-ready chatbot architecture integrating natural language understanding, real-time semantic search, dynamic context window sizing, and system guardrails for multi-tenant deployments.
objective: To architect an autonomous virtual assistant that successfully answers complex domain-specific user inquiries without hallucinations or data leakage.
process: Mapped hierarchical conversational flows, implemented semantic text chunking algorithms, developed an efficient vector search embedding pipeline, and configured robust system prompt guidelines to enforce safety boundaries.
valueProposition: Demonstrates my advanced capability in implementing server-side Generative AI SDKs, managing highly efficient vector databases, and configuring safe agent environments.
uniqueValue: Achieves highly relevant, domain-specific chat grounding by dynamically searching external vector stores and injecting localized context directly into the model context window.
relevance: Highly critical for modern software roles focusing on AI integration, automated customer intelligence, scalable data engineering, and modern web application development.
references: Google Cloud Generative AI System Design Patterns, LangChain Retrieval-Augmented Generation Architecture Guide

title: Timeline of Artificial Intelligence Milestones
introduction: A historically accurate, highly detailed chronological roadmap detailing the structural evolution and key breakthroughs of Artificial Intelligence.
description: This educational design artifact maps the fundamental epochs of AI history—from Alan Turing's conceptual foundations to the modern deep learning paradigm and generative model scaling era.
objective: To synthesize the complex, multi-decade history of machine intelligence into an intuitive, accessible, and high-fidelity chronological visual guide.
process: Researched historical AI breakthroughs, selected key paradigm-shifting turning points (the Turing Test, Dartmouth, AI Winters, AlexNet, Transformers, and ChatGPT), categorized epochs, and mapped their modern systemic impact.
valueProposition: Demonstrates strong historical comprehension of AI system design evolution, user interface engineering, responsive design layout practices, and content hierarchy curation.
uniqueValue: Synthesizes major academic and industry milestones into a single, clean, cohesive visual timeline with balanced negative space and rich context.
relevance: Highly relevant for engineering roles requiring strong visual communication, educational interface design, content structuring, and historical context of deep learning.
references: The Quest for Artificial Intelligence (Nils J. Nilsson), Computing Machinery and Intelligence (A.M. Turing)
